title: Hop Harrigan America's Ace of the Airways
writer: Jon L. Blummer, Ande Lamb, George H. Plympton
actors: William Bakewell, Jennifer Holt, Robert 'Buzz' Henry
plot: Hop Harrigan (William Bakewell) and his pal "Tank" Tinker (Sumner Getchell) operate a small airport and flying service, and are hired by J. Westly Arnold (Emmett Vogan) to fly an eccentric inventor, Dr. Tabor (John Merton), to his...
